cta_health_issues: Too many CTAs (18). Research shows effectiveness drops after 3-4. Consider removing the weakest ones.
CTA 'See pricing' targets decision readers but article is awareness-stage content.
CTA 'image source' appears 4 times. Repeated identical CTAs create banner blindness.
